data.title: 国际服Arcie小编女仆装与乐队换装回 #17
data.summary: CM Arcie’s official live stream is returning tomorrow, Sensei!✨ Be sure to tune in and join the fun
data.body:
CM Arcie’s official live stream is returning tomorrow, Sensei!✨
Be sure to tune in and join the fun – Don’t miss out!

🗓️Date & Time: 11/20 (Wed) 0:00 AM (UTC)
➡️YouTube Link: https://youtube.com/live/WTpK5kxKpPM

#BlueArchive
![Gcoallva4AAfGZH.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/yP3shjmTRVQuztpjJyqUy9g3IGxxzXL8.jpg)

My apologies, Sensei - Please allow me to correct the schedule from the earlier post!
📢CM Arcie's live stream will begin on 11/20 (Wed) at 1:00 AM (UTC)! 📢
